title: Allmax AA (LR6) Maximum Power Alkaline Double A Batteries (12 Count) – Ultra Long-Lasting, Leakproof Design, 10-Year Shelf Life, Maximum Performance (1.5V)
features: ★ Maximum Power – Allmax AA Maximum Power Alkaline Batteries are premium-grade batteries built with high-quality components and EnergyCircle Technology to supply maximum power to your electronic devices.

★ Ultra Long-Lasting – Allmax AA batteries are considered “ultra long-lasting” and have been independently tested to outperform standard alkaline batteries. This means you can expect Allmax batteries to last longer than other brands.

★ Leakproof Design – Allmax AA batteries use EnergyCircle Technology to ensure a secure seal and prevent electrolyte leakage, safeguarding your electronic devices. This makes Allmax batteries ideal for both everyday household and business applications.

★ 10-Year Shelf Life – Allmax AA batteries are always fresh and maintain power for up to 10 years in proper storage. This makes Allmax batteries perfect for long-term storage and emergency preparedness kits.

★ Maximum Performance – Allmax AA batteries are trusted by families, schools, businesses, hospitals, and government institutions around the world for long-lasting performance and reliability. Allmax AA batteries are compatible with a wide range of high-drain and low-drain electronic devices, including remote controls, flashlights, toys, Xbox controllers, digital cameras, wireless mice, wireless keyboards, radios, bubble machines, door locks, clocks, electric pencil sharpeners, toothbrushes, laser levels, calculators, garage door openers, carbon monoxide detectors, alarm sensors, blood pressure monitors, meters, scanners, and more!

equipment, GPS equipment, etc. Common Questions: Are Allmax alkaline batteries rechargeable? No, Allmax alkaline batteries are not rechargeable. Do not attempt to recharge standard alkaline batteries, as this may cause leakage or explosion. Where can I find the expiration date? You can find the expiration date on the body of the battery or on the box. It is marked with a "Best Before" date. Our Allmax AA Alkaline battery has a 10-year shelf life, meaning under proper storage conditions you can use it any time before this date. Will the battery fit in my device? They usually do. For example, the height of our AA Alkaline batteries is 1.98 inches with an outer diameter of 0.55 inches. This conforms to IEC standards. So if the size of your battery compartment is designed to IEC standards, our batteries will fit. How are Allmax batteries packaged and how to open the packaging? There are 4 Allmax AA Alkaline batteries tightly wrapped in plastic shrink packs, with 3 shrink packs per package that are well-packed in boxes that are easy to open, easy to stock, reclosable, and impact-resistant, so your batteries are always protected. To open the packaging, simply use your fingernail to crease the middle of the plastic shrink pack or use a safe household device to crease the middle of the plastic, and then bend the shrink pack to open and access the batteries. If you have any further questions, please contact our support department so that we can assist you further. Can I store batteries in the refrigerator? It is not a good idea to store batteries in the refrigerator. It is best to store batteries in a cool, dry place. We DO NOT recommend storing batteries in the fridge. This does not lengthen battery life. For safety reasons, please keep batteries away from children and from extreme temperatures, hot or cold. Do not freeze batteries, and do not expose batteries to fire. Extreme temperatures may cause batteries to explode or may lead to harmful outcomes. Are batteries affected by temperature? Extreme high or low temperature is not good for batteries. DO NOT use or store batteries at high or low temperature. Low temperature may cause battery discharge capacity to drop, while high temperature may lead to battery leakage. What should I pay attention to during use? Before use, remove any protective film from the battery and ensure the positive and negative terminals in the battery compartment are clean and free of dirt or rust. Do not mix old and new batteries, or combine batteries of different types or brands. How can I track the status of my order? If you have any questions or concerns about the delivery or status of your order, please contact Amazon through their website or by calling their toll-free number. Together we work to ensure your batteries are delivered on time and they are in perfect condition. What if I receive a broken or defective product? If your box or product is damaged in any way, please contact Amazon. Amazon is responsible for delivering our products, so they will take care of your order. If you need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach us through Amazon. Our information is easily accessible.
